Box #6—Put One Thing Inside Another
v1.01 (c) Deutsch & Associates, Inc Published by Marketing Rebel LLC
Idea Power by David L. Deutsch
MarketingRebelClub.com/marketing-rebel-courses/idea-power/
Idea Power / Idea Power Adventures / Adventure #3—Box #6 Put One Thing inside Another
*How might you put something inside something else? Or can you do one action
inside another?
How might you put one idea inside another? How might you put one part of your business
inside another––literally, by merging them “on the books” or making a physical move. Can
you put one thing inside another metaphorically, by somehow making them function as if
they’re inside each other? In terms of your specific problem, what does the idea of “putting
something inside something else” make you think of that might help?
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 1 of 1 --
